workloads.name: workgroup-atomic-smoke
workloads.description: Windows D3D12 compute smoke for the WorkgroupAtomicPerf-aligned atomic kernel.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict D3D12 compute smoke contract with adapter-autodiscovered Dawn mapping and direct timing normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (baseline/comparison divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.description: Shader robustness pipeline stress aligned with Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf (MatMulFloatOneDimSharedArray, f32, 512x512x512).
workloads.name: shader-compile pipeline stress
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict D3D12 pipeline smoke contract. Both sides create and execute the same compute pipeline shape with adapter-autodiscovered Dawn mapping and direct timing normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (baseline/comparison divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: upload-64kb-smoke
workloads.description: Windows D3D12 upload smoke for the 64KB WriteBuffer contract.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict D3D12 smoke upload contract with staged upload-copy work on both sides and adapter-autodiscovered Dawn mapping.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (baseline/comparison divisors fixed to 1.0).
